Normal service and the bar is quite poor, they have food that they prepare but average quality

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playero es buena las naftas están mas caras el parque que tiene cuenta con parrillas lastima la vista que es la de la ruta panamericana ruta 9

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendants is good, but the gas is more expensive. The park has grills, but the view is of the Pan-American Highway (Route 9).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBay1hbHR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención de sus empleados, personas cálidas, sencillas y humilde!!! El lugar muy acogedor y seguro!!!

(Translated by Google)
The staff provided excellent service; they were warm, down-to-earth, and humble! The place was very welcoming and safe!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURna3ZLemlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
ACA tendría que definir que tipo de unidades de servicio y en que forma piensa dar a sus asociados y público en general.  En este caso en particular es una estación de servicio básica,  no demasiada limpia ni bien presentada.  El  àrea verde no está cuidada y tiene un predio importante que no está aprovechado para agregar  otros canales de venta complementarios.  De la forma descripta es un lugar de tránsito para recarga de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
ACA needs to define what type of service units it plans to offer its members and the general public, and how. In this particular case, it's a basic service station, not very clean or well-presented. The green area is neglected, and it has a significant amount of land that isn't being used to add other complementary sales channels. As described, it's simply a transit point for refueling.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnXzU3emlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar, demasiado concurrida y se hace cola para la carga de combustible tenes que estar con paciensa!!!! Por esto no le doy 4 estrellas.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place, but very crowded and there's a long queue for fuel, you need to be patient! That's why I'm not giving it 4 stars.
